name: Carrots Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut the carrots into 2-inch x 1/4-inch julienned pieces.
2. Place the carrots in a large skillet and add water to cover.
3. Cover the skillet and heat to boiling.
4. Boil the carrots until they are crisp tender, about 3 minutes.
5. Whisk the remaining ingredients together in a small bowl until smooth.
6. Drain the carrots and toss with the vinaigrette.
7. Serve warm or at room temperature, or refrigerate and serve cold.
